{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Shadeshifter
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Shadeshifter]] urges [[Meia]] to attack [[Yala]] while she is vulnerable.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shadeshifter]] is a type of [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
